claim_support.reason: Most financial and operational claims are well-supported by the authoritative evidence chunks. However, specific stock performance statistics (21.7% weekly gain, 44.3% YTD, 13.1% monthly gain) and promotional details (75% discount) cited in Recent Developments are not visible in the provided evidence snippets. Additionally, the claim regarding 'successful integration of AI features' lacks explicit support in the cited news snippets.

numerical_accuracy.reason: Severe numerical error in Net Income YoY Growth claim. The report states Net Income surged 190.61% from $684M (Q3 2024) to $959M (Q3 2025). Mathematical verification (959/684 - 1) yields approximately 40% growth, not 190.61%. This error is present in both the report text and the cited calculation object, materially misrepresenting performance magnitude.

citation_precision.reason: Structured citation IDs correctly correspond to the relevant evidence chunks (news, financial statements, calculations). There are no mismatches between the claims and the authoritative cited chunk IDs provided in the evidence pack.

temporal_validity.reason: All evidence dates (news articles from Nov 2025, financial periods ending Q3 2025) are on or before the report as-of date of 2025-11-24. No post-as-of information is used as fact.

consistency.reason: Severe internal inconsistency regarding Net Income growth. The report explicitly states Net Income grew 190.61% from $684M to $959M (Business & Competitive Analysis Para 2), which is mathematically impossible. This contradiction between the growth percentage and the absolute dollar values undermines the reliability of the financial analysis.

unsupported_claims.explanation: Stock performance statistics (21.7% weekly gain, 44.3% YTD return) in Recent Developments Para 1 are not visible in the cited news snippets.
unsupported_claims.offending_span: 21.7% share price gain over the subsequent week and a 44.3% year-to-date return

unsupported_claims.explanation: Stock performance statistic (13.1% gain over preceding month) in Recent Developments Para 3 is not visible in the cited news snippet.
Promotional discount detail (75% off) in Recent Developments Para 4 is not visible in the cited news snippet.
Claim regarding AI integration success in Business & Competitive Analysis Para 2 is not supported by the visible text of the cited earnings call snippet.
unsupported_claims.offending_span: successful integration of AI features across its platforms

numerical_errors.explanation: Net Income YoY Growth is stated as 190.61%, but the provided base ($684M) and current ($959M) values imply ~40% growth. This material error misrepresents earnings performance.
numerical_errors.offending_span: net income surged 190.61% to $959 million compared to the prior year period

inconsistencies.explanation: Internal contradiction between Net Income growth percentage (190.61%) and the absolute Net Income values ($684M to $959M) stated within the same report sections. The math does not reconcile.
